title: Luffy Marks the Promise
description: On pages 1–4, luffy marks the promise as luffy turns Laboon’s grief into a promise of a future rematch, and the crew receives the Log Pose needed for the Grand Line.
scene: Luffy Marks the Promise. Luffy turns Laboon’s grief into a promise of a future rematch, and the crew receives the Log Pose needed for the Grand Line. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: And... done!

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: This will be a sign of our promise to fight again!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So don't you bash your head against the wall and make it disappear.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: By the time we come back, you hear!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Fuoo hhh,

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: Good!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Alright then, time to chart out our navigation route.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: This elephant trout is just perfect for cooking!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: How could that idiot just destroy our ship!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hey, I could use a little help over here, zero!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I ain't no shipwright, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What? You're being so noisy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's the matter, my dear nami!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If it's about the meal, then it's all ready!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ugh... I'll take a brief break from the ship repairs and eat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The comp- ass...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's broken! It's pointing all over the place!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hmm.. It appears you've come here without knowing anything.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm quite amazed. Did you come here to just throw your lives away?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ah, time for food?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: In your case, it's time for feeding.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I've said before that common sense fails to uphold in this ocean.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: That compass isn't broken.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Then is it... the magnetic field!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes... There exists a geomagnetic anomaly across Grand Line,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Due to many islands here being rich with various minerals.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Not only that, the currents and the winds here are as unpredictable as they can be.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: As a Navigator, you should well understand how terrifying that can be.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If you venture out into this ocean without knowing anything, you'll die for sure.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: True... without a reliable way to tell one's directions, it's all hopeless.

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on luffy marks the promise. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
